description: Style NoteUnderstated colouring on the base with shiny stones makes these sandals classy and elegant. They can be worn with Ethnic Indian wear. These pair of catwalk sandals can be worn to work with a pair of jeans and a nice kurta and some ethnic accessories.Product DetailsBlunt toed sandals with a red thong style strap with a bow detail with crystal embellishmentBrown footbed with a red heel patch TPR outsole with an upraised heelMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
